# simple-select

## Import

```typescript
import { LuSimpleSelectInputComponent, LuSelectPanelComponent } from '@lucca-front/ng/simple-select';
```

## API Reference

### LuSimpleSelectInputComponent (component)

**Selector:** `lu-simple-select`

### LuSelectPanelComponent (component)

**Selector:** `lu-select-panel`
